data.last_assistant_message:
All weather references are gone. Here's a summary of what was removed:

**Deleted:**
- `src/lib/agents/search/widgets/weatherWidget.ts`
- `src/app/api/weather/route.ts`
- `src/components/Widgets/Weather.tsx`
- `src/components/WeatherWidget.tsx`
- `public/weather-ico/` (SVG icon assets)

**Edited:**
- `widgets/index.ts` — removed weatherWidget registration
- `types.ts` — removed `showWeatherWidget` from ClassifierOutput
- `classifier.ts` — removed field from zod schema
- `prompts/search/classifier.ts` — removed label, renumbered, cleaned skipSearch text
- `Widgets/Renderer.tsx` — removed `case 'weather'` block
- `EmptyChat.tsx` — removed WeatherWidget and showWeather state
- `config/clientRegistry.ts` — removed `getShowWeatherWidget`
- `config/index.ts` — removed "Show weather widget" and "Measurement Unit" settings

TypeScript compiles clean. The build error (`better-sqlite3` bindings) is pre-existing and unrelated.
